test.name: Deduplicate in rt-index chunk
test.db_insert: INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ( 1, 11, 'Fare thee well' ), ( 1, 12, 'And if for ever got' ), ( 2, 21, 'Still for ever fare thee well' ), ( 2, 22, 'under_score <stuff>got removed</stuff>' ), ( 2, 23, 'And if for ever got' ), ( 3, 31, 'Still for ever fare thee well' ), ( 3, 32, 'under_score <stuff>got removed</stuff>' ), ( 3, 33, 'And if for ever got' ), ( 4, 44, 'Andd if for ever got' )
